<path>/home/user/code/src/id/nix-common.nix</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>96:     export RUST_BACKTRACE=1
97: 
98:     # nix develop reconstructs PATH, losing HM session paths.
99:     # Restore them: devshell → HM → system
100: 
101:     # Source HM session vars and extract any PATH additions
102:     _pre_profile_path="$PATH"
103:     unset __HM_SESS_VARS_SOURCED
104:     . "$HOME/.profile" 2>/dev/null || true
105:     _hm_paths="''${PATH%:$_pre_profile_path}"
106:     [ "$_hm_paths" = "$PATH" ] && _hm_paths=""
107: 
108:     # Separate devshell from system using NIX_PROFILES (NixOS env var)
109:     # Non-NixOS: NIX_PROFILES is unset, everything stays in devshell, PATH unchanged
110:     _devshell_only=""
111:     _system_only=""
112:     _remaining="$_pre_profile_path"
113:     while [ -n "$_remaining" ]; do
114:       _e="''${_remaining%%:*}"
115:       [ "$_e" = "$_remaining" ] && _remaining="" || _remaining="''${_remaining#*:}"
116:       _is_sys=0
117:       for _p in $NIX_PROFILES; do
118:         case "$_e" in "$_p"/*) _is_sys=1; break ;; esac
119:       done
120:       if [ "$_is_sys" = 1 ]; then
121:         _system_only="$_system_only''${_system_only:+:}$_e"
122:       else
123:         _devshell_only="$_devshell_only''${_devshell_only:+:}$_e"
124:       fi
125:     done
126: 
127:     # Reconstruct: devshell → HM → system
128:     export PATH="$_devshell_only''${_hm_paths:+:$_hm_paths}''${_system_only:+:$_system_only}"
129:     unset _pre_profile_path _hm_paths _devshell_only _system_only _remaining _e _is_sys _p
130:   '';
131: }
